---
title: "Dr. Barnardo\'s Homes"
---

## Dr. Barnardo\'s Homes

**Type:** organization

### About

Founded by Thomas Barnardo in 1867, this organization ran orphanages and did welfare work among children.  See http://www.barnardos.org.uk/who_we_are/history.htm

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
